name: Game Creator AI
description: Free, browser-based platform for generating unlimited games with AI. Two apps: educational learning games and entertainment game prototyping.

capabilities.name: educational-game-generation
capabilities.description: Generate learning games with lesson structure, quizzes, and classroom-ready themes for teachers, tutors, and students.

capabilities.name: entertainment-game-generation
capabilities.description: Generate game specs, mechanics, and prompt details for arcade, platformer, shooter, strategy, and other entertainment game types.
